tools.name: wscdc_validate_comprobante
tools.description: Validate that a received factura was actually issued by AFIP with a real CAE. Returns resultado='A' (approved), 'N' (rejected — likely forged or wrong data), or 'O' (observed — exists but a non-key field differs).

tools.name: wscdc_health
tools.description: Ping the AFIP WSCDC service (Dummy operation). Returns AppServer/DbServer/AuthServer statuses.
